---
title: "Portfolio"
toc: true
---
NR426 Final Project
- Link github repo
- Summary paragraph
- Embed?
ESS 330 Final Project? – Maybe
- Okay quality of work, certainly an exposition of effort
- Embed?
WR 204 Report?
- Older, less robust writing
ESS 440 Capstone Report
Scientific Writing 

Other Work
ATFAB 
- Web Redesign
- Knowledge Database Template???
- ACT TDM Impact Report

Passion Projects
- Photography
- Prep a blog/writing section but don't air it yet
